title: Classic Chicken Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry recipe with chicken as the main ingredient, ready in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of buttery sauce in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced veggies to the skillet and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-5 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the silky soy sauce.
Serve the chicken and veggies over nostalgic rice and enjoy!
Optional: Garnish with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of sesame seeds.
